body:
`60-80`: _🛠️ Refactor suggestion_: **Extract metadata header into helper**

The `with log_path.open(...)` block mixes metadata writing and subprocess invocation. Splitting them clarifies intent.

<details>
<summary>🛠️ Refactor suggestion</summary>

```diff
-with log_path.open("w") as logf:
-    logf.write(f"=== harness.runner.run_claude ===\n")
-    logf.write(f"cwd:     {cwd}\n")
-    ...
+def _write_log_header(logf, cwd, timeout_sec, prompt): ...
+with log_path.open("w") as logf:
+    _write_log_header(logf, cwd, timeout_sec, prompt)
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
In lib/harness/runner.py around lines 60-80, extract the log-header writing into a private helper `_write_log_header(logf, cwd, timeout_sec, prompt)` and call it from `run_claude`. Keep behaviour identical; only the structure changes.
```

</details>
